ReplicatorArn.description: Amazon Resource Name for the created replicator.

CurrentVersion.description: The current version of the MSK replicator.

Description.description: A summary description of the replicator.

KafkaClusters.description: Specifies a list of Kafka clusters which are targets of the replicator.

ReplicationInfoList.description: A list of replication configurations, where each configuration targets a given source cluster to target cluster replication flow.

ServiceExecutionRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role used by the replicator to access external resources.

Tags.description: A collection of tags associated with a resource

LogDelivery.description: Configuration for log delivery for the replicator.

TopicsToReplicate.description: List of regular expression patterns indicating the topics to copy.

TopicsToExclude.description: List of regular expression patterns indicating the topics that should not be replicated.

CopyTopicConfigurations.description: Whether to periodically configure remote topics to match their corresponding upstream topics.

CopyAccessControlListsForTopics.description: Whether to periodically configure remote topic ACLs to match their corresponding upstream topics.

DetectAndCopyNewTopics.description: Whether to periodically check for new topics and partitions.

StartingPosition.description: Configuration for specifying the position in the topics to start replicating from.

TopicNameConfiguration.description: Configuration for specifying replicated topic names should be the same as their corresponding upstream topics or prefixed with source cluster alias.

ReplicationStartingPosition.description: Configuration for specifying the position in the topics to start replicating from.

ReplicationStartingPositionType.description: The type of replication starting position.

ReplicationTopicNameConfiguration.description: Configuration for specifying replicated topic names should be the same as their corresponding upstream topics or prefixed with source cluster alias.

ReplicationTopicNameConfigurationType.description: The type of replicated topic name.

ConsumerGroupReplication.description: Configuration relating to consumer group replication.

ConsumerGroupsToReplicate.description: List of regular expression patterns indicating the consumer groups to copy.

ConsumerGroupsToExclude.description: List of regular expression patterns indicating the consumer groups that should not be replicated.

SynchroniseConsumerGroupOffsets.description: Whether to periodically write the translated offsets to __consumer_offsets topic in target cluster.

DetectAndCopyNewConsumerGroups.description: Whether to periodically check for new consumer groups.

ConsumerGroupOffsetSyncMode.description: The consumer group offset synchronization mode.
The consumer group offset synchronization mode.

ReplicationInfo.description: Specifies configuration for replication between a source and target Kafka cluster.

SourceKafkaClusterArn.description: Amazon Resource Name of the source Kafka cluster.

SourceKafkaClusterId.description: The ID of the source Kafka cluster.

TargetKafkaClusterArn.description: Amazon Resource Name of the target Kafka cluster.

TargetKafkaClusterId.description: The ID of the target Kafka cluster.

TargetCompressionType.description: The type of compression to use writing records to target Kafka cluster.

ConsumerGroupReplication.description: Configuration relating to consumer group replication.

AmazonMskCluster.description: Details of an Amazon MSK cluster.

MskClusterArn.description: The ARN of an Amazon MSK cluster.

KafkaClusterClientVpcConfig.description: Details of an Amazon VPC which has network connectivity to the Kafka cluster.

SecurityGroupIds.description: The AWS security groups to associate with the elastic network interfaces in order to specify what the replicator has access to. If a security group is not specified, the default security group associated with the VPC is used.

SubnetIds.description: The list of subnets to connect to in the virtual private cloud (VPC). AWS creates elastic network interfaces inside these subnets.

KafkaCluster.description: Details of a Kafka cluster for replication.

AmazonMskCluster.description: Details of an Amazon MSK cluster.

ApacheKafkaCluster.description: Details of an Apache Kafka cluster.

VpcConfig.description: Details of an Amazon VPC which has network connectivity to the Apache Kafka cluster.

ClientAuthentication.description: Details of the client authentication used by the Apache Kafka cluster.

EncryptionInTransit.description: Details of encryption in transit to the Apache Kafka cluster.

ApacheKafkaCluster.description: Details of an Apache Kafka cluster.

ApacheKafkaClusterId.description: The ID of the Apache Kafka cluster.

BootstrapBrokerString.description: The bootstrap broker string of the Apache Kafka cluster.

KafkaClusterClientAuthentication.description: Details of the client authentication used by the Apache Kafka cluster.

SecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Secrets Manager secret.

KafkaClusterEncryptionInTransit.description: Details of encryption in transit to the Apache Kafka cluster.

EncryptionType.description: The type of encryption in transit to the Apache Kafka cluster.

KafkaClusterEncryptionInTransitType.description: The type of encryption in transit to the Apache Kafka cluster.

LogDelivery.description: Configuration for log delivery for the replicator.

ReplicatorLogDelivery.description: Details of the log delivery for the replicator.

CloudWatchLogs.description: Details of the CloudWatch Logs destination for replicator logs.

Firehose.description: Details of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that is the destination for replicator logs.

S3.description: Details of the Amazon S3 destination for replicator logs.

CloudWatchLogs.description: Details about delivering logs to CloudWatch Logs.

Enabled.description: Whether log delivery to CloudWatch Logs is enabled.

LogGroup.description: The CloudWatch log group that is the destination for log delivery.

Firehose.description: Details about delivering logs to Firehose.

Enabled.description: Whether log delivery to Firehose is enabled.

DeliveryStream.description: The Firehose delivery stream that is the destination for log delivery.

S3.description: Details about delivering logs to S3.

Enabled.description: Whether log delivery to S3 is enabled.

Bucket.description: The S3 bucket that is the destination for log delivery.

Prefix.description: The S3 prefix that is the destination for log delivery.
